Hello, I'm Arthur Bréant

Welcome to my home

I am currently a consultant and trainer at ThinkR. Passionate about the web and tech in general, I am curious and always want to discover new things...

From the mock-up, to the development of the code until the final integration, I wish to discover and share my knowledge and my creations.
